consumerApp.title: B2B Ordering App
consumerApp.description: Kirana store ordering app - vernacular-first, 70%+ local language users. Click any screen to enlarge.

deliveryApp.title: Delivery & Routing Management
deliveryApp.description: Internal delivery app tracking 12M+ kg of goods. Route optimization, cash reconciliation, return management.

dashboard.title: Sales Analytics Dashboard
dashboard.description: Built from real operational data (Mar 2018 – May 2020). Interactive analytics covering revenue, categories, returns, margins, and customer segmentation.
dashboard.note: Note: The cumulative sales figure of ₹55Cr+ reflects the period through Dec 2020, including the post-acquisition Udaan phase.

sectionDesc: Led design, category strategy, and operations for a B2B kirana marketplace, from first wireframe to ₹55Cr+ GMV and acquisition by Udaan. Every screen below was designed and shipped by me.

thirdPartyProjects.title: Jeevani Sanjeevani
thirdPartyProjects.description: Farm-to-consumer platform digitising Horticorp stalls. Designed B2C ordering app, rider/delivery partner app, and design guidelines for rural store operators.

thirdPartyProjects.title: B2C Ecommerce + Sales CRM
thirdPartyProjects.description: Designed a B2C ecommerce app for 4,000+ SKUs (hardware, sanitary, electricals) and an internal CRM app for sales pipeline management and employee task tracking.

video.title: Platform in Action
video.description: A day in our operations - from warehouse stacking and route planning to last-mile delivery across kirana stores in Trivandrum.
